title: Senior Teacher - Teach For India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Teach For India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Teach For India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Teach For India:
Teach For India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
